title: Support
metaDescription: Help and frequently asked questions about Dropp: Apple Watch alarms, notification sounds, restoring a purchase, local data, and contact.
q1Title: The alarm doesn't ring on the Apple Watch?
q1Body: A locked watch, or one you're not wearing, never alerts — that's an Apple rule: the alert falls back to the iPhone. Wear the watch unlocked (wrist detection on) to receive alerts on your wrist.
q2Title: The alert sound is the system sound on the watch?
q2Body: This is also an Apple limitation: custom sounds are not allowed in watchOS notifications. Dropp's melodies play on the iPhone and inside the app.
q3Body: Dropp Settings → Upgrade to Dropp Pro → "Restore purchase". The subscription is managed and cancelled in your App Store account settings.
q4Body: Dropp collects nothing — everything stays on your devices. Details in the privacy policy. Deleting the app deletes everything.
contactBody: A question, a problem, an idea: contact@dropp.care.
